files_deferred: Real provider adapters (Tradier/Tastytrade/Massive/Yahoo) and composite feed -> Phase 2.
bars_1m and option_chain population from live/recorded providers -> Phase 2.
behavior_preserved: Exchange session date computed in America/New_York, never UTC (market_calendar._session_date).
Session open/close via exchange_calendars XNYS; half-day = close before 16:00 ET.
Entry lockout window before close; settlement availability after close.
intentional_changes: market_calendar module-level functions reorganized into a typed MarketCalendar class returning timezone-aware datetimes and a SessionStatus enum.
Introduced canonical, immutable, content-addressed contracts (contracts/common.py, contracts/market.py) with deterministic snapshot_id/content_hash.
System A snapshot consumed via SystemASnapshotAdapter from its serialized to_dict() output; System B never imports System A code (spec §4.1).
deliverables: src/spy_der/contracts/common.py (validation, canonical JSON, content hash, deterministic IDs, typed error codes, provenance)

tests.name: pytest (30 tests, unit + parity + existing scaffold)

known_gaps: Golden parity fixture locks deterministic ingestion output; full field-level parity against a RUNNING System A is deferred until recorded ticks exist (Phase 2).
System A records feed status per source; component-level granularity for BREADTH/FLOW/INTERNALS is carried only when supplied. Provider-vs-component reconciliation completes in Phase 2.
Local dev interpreter is 3.11; project and CI target 3.12. Code avoids 3.12-only syntax; CI verifies on 3.12.
rollback: Revert the Phase 1 commit. Package import path returns to the prior state; no runtime services or persisted state are introduced.
The new dependencies (exchange-calendars, pandas) are additive; removing them reverts to a dependency-free install.
next_phase: Phase 2 — Providers and replay (spec §63): provider adapters, composite feed, recording, replay, corruption detection, deterministic replay fixtures. Populate bars_1m and option_chain in the canonical snapshot and capture the first recorded-tick parity corpus against System A.
